svg.text: INVITE REDEMPTION - SEQUENCE AND VALIDATION CHAIN

g.text: joined: Invitee lands in household home
membership change propagates < 2s to all members
Non-members cannot read invites under RLS.
The RPC validates and inserts atomically.
Expired, revoked, used up, full, unknown:
each failure mode gets its own message.
10 failed attempts per rolling hour, then a
Full household (20) and re-join by an
Codes travel out-of-band; the invitee enters
SC-001: create to shared household in under 90 seconds
SC-004: membership changes visible in under 2 seconds
